vocab.meaning: quá trình tự trau dồi một mình
vocab.example: I find that solitary refinement allows me to process complex theories without any external interruptions.
Studying in a group often creates a synergistic effect where the collective intelligence surpasses that of an individual.

vocab.meaning: sự tập trung không bị gián đoạn
vocab.example: Working alone is my preference as it guarantees a period of uninterrupted focus to tackle demanding assignments.

vocab.meaning: trách nhiệm giải trình giữa bạn bè/đồng trang lứa
vocab.example: Group sessions instill a sense of peer-to-peer accountability, which prevents me from procrastinating.

vocab.meaning: xung đột nhận thức (để nảy sinh ý tưởng mới)
vocab.example: I enjoy debating topics with others because the resulting cognitive dissonance often leads to deeper insights.

vocab.meaning: thói quen học tập riêng biệt/khác thường
vocab.example: I prefer studying by myself because I have certain idiosyncratic study habits that might distract others.
Collaborative learning facilitates the cross-pollination of ideas, allowing us to see problems from diverse angles.

vocab.meaning: có lợi cho/tạo điều kiện cho
vocab.example: A quiet library environment is highly conducive to deep work and information retention.
When we study together, we can pool our resources and share various perspectives on the curriculum.

vocab.meaning: phát biểu/diễn đạt ý nghĩ thành lời
vocab.example: I find it helpful to vocalize my thoughts to a partner, as explaining a concept helps solidify my own understanding.
